decoder_heading: Privacy Statement
ident_heading: Privacy Statement
heading_content_part: Privacy StatementWe commit to keep your personal and account information (collectively, “Personal Data”) safe with us, as a shared responsibility and accountability between yourself and our bank.

decoder_heading: Our Pledge
ident_heading: Our Pledge
heading_content_part: Our Pledge

decoder_heading: We honor the secrecy of bank deposits and the confidentiality of Personal Data, as mandated under and in accordance with prevailing banking and data privacy laws, rules and regulations in the Republic of the Philippines.
ident_heading: We honor the secrecy of bank deposits and the confidentiality of Personal Data, as mandated under and in accordance with prevailing banking and data privacy laws, rules and regulations in the Republic of the Philippines.
heading_content_part: We honor the secrecy of bank deposits and the confidentiality of Personal Data, as mandated under and in accordance with prevailing banking and data privacy laws, rules and regulations in the Republic of the Philippines. Accordingly, unless otherwise required by applicable laws, rules and regulations, we will not disclose Personal Data that you have provided to us without securing your permission.
